ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PLAINTIFF MANDIP DHILLON'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENA RE PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYMENT HISTORY AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS HEARING SET FOR JUL-14-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MANDIP DHILLON'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENA RE PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYMENT HISTORY AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. MOTION TO QUASH IS GRANTED. THE DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO MEET THE NECESSARY ENHANCED BURDEN TO SHOW RELEVANCE APPLICABLE TO EMPLOYMENT RECORDS FROM PREVIOUS EMPLOYERS. SEE BOARD OF TRUSTEES V. SUPERIOR COURT (1981) 119 CAL. APP. 3D 516 [174 CAL. RPTR. 160]. SANCTIONS IN THE SUM OF $1,000.00 ARE AWARDED AS AGAINST DEFENDANT, TO BE PAID WITHIN THIRTY DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTION ARE AWARDED BECAUSE OF DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO ENGAGE IN A MEANINGFUL "MEET AND CONFER" PROCESS AFTER RECEIPT OF PLAINTIFF'S "MEET AND CONFER" LETTER WHICH SHOULD HAVE RESULTED IN A SIGNIFICANT LIMITATION AS TO THE SCOPE OF THE SUBPOENAS. THE PARTIES SHALL AGREE TO A CONFIDENTIALITY STIPULATION TO BE SO ORDERED. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE PROPOSED ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2014 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication
Off Calendar Sep-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT LASERAWAY MEDICAL GROUP, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/Adjudication is OFF-CALENDAR. CASE SETTLED. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/EHG

Plaintiff Mandip Dhillon'S Motion To Quash Subpoena Re Plaintiff'S Employment History And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeffrey Fulton, Esq of Poswall White & Cutler (916-449-1300) for Mandip Dhillon, Plaintiff and moving party through Court Call.
Andrea McCarthy Esq of Yukevich Cavanaugh (213-362-7777) for Laseraway Medical Group, Defendant and opposing party through Court Call.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling.Plaintiff Mandip Dhillon'S Motion To Quash Subpoena Re Plaintiff'S Employment History And Request For Sanctions is Granted. Motion to quash is granted. The defendant has failed to meet the necessary enhanced burden to show relevance applicable to employment records from previous employers. See Board of Trustees v. Superior Court (1981) 119 Cal. App. 3d 516 [174 Cal. Rptr. 160]. Sanctions in the sum of $1,000.00 are awarded as against defendant, to be paid within thirty days of the date of this Order. Sanction are awarded because of defendant's failure to engage in a meaningful "meet and confer" process after receipt of plaintiff's "meet and confer" letter which should have resulted in a significant limitation as to the scope of the subpoenas. The parties shall agree to a confidentiality stipulation to be so ordered. Moving party to prepare proposed order approved as to form. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Quash Subpoena Re Pltf'S Employment History And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF MANDIP DHILLON'S Motion To Quash Subpoena Re Plaintiff's Employment History And Request For Sanctions is Transferred to the Discovery Calendar to be heard at 9:00 am on the same date in room 301. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/PJB)

Plaintiff Mandip Dhillon'S Motion To Quash Subpoena Re Plaintiff'S Employment History And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-14-2014 Continued To Jul-17-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Andrea McCarthy, Esq. of Yukevich Cavanaugh (213-362-7777) for Laserway Medical Group, Defendant and opposing party.
No other appearance on the matter.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
Plaintiff Mandip Dhillon'S Motion To Quash Subpoena Re Plaintiff'S Employment History And Request For Sanctions is continued to July 17, 2014. The basis is late contesting of the tentative ruling. Oral argument required. Opposing party to send notice. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
